events.event_description: U.S. Legation established at Naples when first Chargé d'Affaires John Nelson presented credentials.

evidence.quote: John Nelson, Chargé d'Affaires. Appointed: 1831-10-24. Credentials presented: 1832-01-25.

events.event_description: U.S. Legation at Naples closed in anticipation of the entry of King Victor Emmanuel into the city, ending U.S. diplomatic representation in Two Sicilies.

evidence.quote: Closed the Legation at Naples in anticipation of the entry of King Victor Emmanuel into city, November 2- 1860-11-06.
